parameters.query:
SELECT 
  c.YCODCV_0,
  c.YNOM_0,
  c.YPRENOM_0,
  c.YEMAILPER_0,
  c.YPOSTE_0,
  p.YTIT_0
FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.YCV AS c
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE AS p 
  ON c.YPOSTE_0 = p.YNUM_0
WHERE c.CREDATTIM_0 >= CAST(GETDATE() - 1 AS date)
  AND c.CREDATTIM_0 <  CAST(GETDATE() AS date);

select 
  S.XSAL_0,
  S.XNAMSAL_0,
  S.XPRENOM_0,
  S.XEMAIL_0,
  S.XFLG_0,
  P.YTIT_0,
  Y.TIDCHAT_0,
  Y.YBOT_0,
  Y.LAN_0
  FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL AS S
  LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE AS P ON S.ZPOSTE_0 = P.YNUM_0
  LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.YAIINFOSAL AS Y ON S.XSAL_0 = Y.XSAL_0
  where S.XFLG_0 =2 and P.YTIT_0 IN (
    'PRÉSIDENT DIRECTEUR GÉNÉRAL',
    'RESPONSABLE RESSOURCES HUMAINES',
    'RESPONSABLE RECRUTEMENT'
  )
